items.title: CL final predictions: Arsenal can go from nearly-men to double winners
items.summary: Arsenal face Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League final and by ending their wait for the Premier League title, the Gunners have removed the fear, tension and doubt that has haunted previous campaigns, writes betting guru Lewis Jones. He has three tips for the big one.....

items.title: Crystal Palace v Rayo Vallecano: Conference League final – live
items.summary: ⚽ Updates from 8pm (BST) kick-off in Leipzig ⚽ From fury to a final: Palace’s topsy-turvy road ⚽ Get in touch! items.title: Barcelona in advanced talks over signing Anthony Gordon from Newcastle
items.summary: Winger could travel to Spain for a medical this week Clubs in talks over deal that could be worth around £70m Newcastle and Barcelona are in advanced negotiations that could conclude with Anthony Gordon exchanging St James’ Park for the Camp Nou. items.title: Djokovic through amid French Open boos as Swiatek wins, Rybakina, Jones exit
items.summary: Novak Djokovic progressed to the third round of the French Open after seeing off French world No 74 Valentin Royer 6-3 6-2 6-7 (7-9) 6-3 amid a feisty Roland-Garros atmosphere.

items.title: Scotland's McGinn the troublemaker for Brazil - Silva
items.summary: Brazil legend Thiago Silva singles out John McGinn as the threat for his country's World Cup hopefuls.

items.title: Barcelona reach agreement with Newcastle for Gordon over £69m deal
items.summary: Barcelona have reached an agreement with Newcastle to sign winger Anthony Gordon.

items.title: Littler focused on Price before thoughts of Premier League trilogy with Humphries
items.summary: While the darting world are looking towards the potential of another Luke Littler and Luke Humphries Premier League final, the world No 1's thoughts have not moved to that just yet.

items.title: Barca agree £69m-plus deal with Newcastle for Gordon
items.summary: Barcelona agree a deal worth more than £70m with Newcastle United for England forward Anthony Gordon.

items.title: Huddersfield Town appoint Drury as head coach
items.summary: League One Huddersfield Town appoint Martin Drury as their head coach.
